3227360.name: ルクちゃんのハートバルーン Demo
3227360.description:
The demo version will not be saved.
The demo version differs from the full version in that some specifications have been changed.


A cute, picture book-like story about Ruku the rabbit and Lish the cat going on an adventure.
Make heart balloons with the flower puzzles, and fly into the sky. How far can we go?

An easy puzzle game collecting flowers

* Find two or more flowers of the same color next to each other.
* Press A or touch when you find them.
Now you can collect flowers and make heart balloons!

Differences from the product version

* You can only play the “Story”.
* There are 3 stages. The dialogue is also slightly rearranged for the demo version.
* The dialogues are also slightly rearranged for the demo version.
3227360.supported_languages:
英语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 日语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
